runes.name: Rune of Haste
runes.flavor: Carved by the Swiftfoot Elves of old. Quickens the limbs.

runes.name: Rune of Lux-Ar
runes.description: Enhances magical power and mana capacity
runes.flavor: Inscribed by the Arcane Academy. Awakens inner luminescence.

runes.name: Rune of Void
runes.description: Grants parasitic power by feeding on chaos
runes.flavor: Dangerous rune from the Abyss Edge. Whispers of hunger from the void.

runes.name: Rune of Resilience
runes.description: Hardens the body against all harm
runes.flavor: Ancient dwarven craft. Stone-touched and enduring.

runes.name: Rune of Clarity
runes.flavor: Priests of the Radiant Keep inscribe these. Mind becomes crystal.

runes.name: Rune of Harvest
runes.description: Increases chance of rare drops and criticals
runes.flavor: Blessed by the old nature gods. Fortune flows to the bearer.

runes.name: Rune of Flux
runes.description: Dramatically increases mana pool for spell-blade builds
runes.flavor: Unstable and volatile. Mana churns within like a maelstrom.

runes.name: Rune of Binding
runes.description: Stabilizes infused items and reduces rebellion chance
runes.flavor: Locks soul and steel together. Containment and control.

runes.name: Rune of Storm
runes.description: Calls down lightning and wind. Rare and powerful.
runes.flavor: Harvested from thunderstruck metals. Crackles with raw energy.

runes.name: Rune of Shadow
runes.description: Grants stealth bonuses and night vision
runes.flavor: Woven from twilight and secret. Darkness becomes your ally.

relics.name: Frost-Bound Blade
relics.description: A legendary blade perpetually coated in arcane ice
relics.lore: Forged in the heart of the Frozen Wastes. Bond with this blade to command winter itself.

relics.name: Eye of the Void
relics.description: An amulet shaped like an unblinking eye. Whispers of the deeper dark.
relics.lore: Pulled from the Abyss Edge. To wear it is to see all truths and lies. Beware the price.

relics.name: Spear of Radiance
relics.description: A pristine spear radiating holy light
relics.lore: Blessed by the Radiant Keep. Strikes with righteousness and divine wrath.

relics.name: Bow of Moonwell
relics.description: Carved from the heart of an ancient moonwell shrine
relics.lore: Drawn from water blessed by the moon goddess. Each arrow finds its mark.

relics.name: Grimoire of the Elders
relics.description: An ancient tome bound in leather that seems to shift and change
relics.lore: Written by the First Scholars. Its pages contain secrets of creation and destruction.

relics.name: Chain of Patientia
relics.description: A soul-binding chain of incredible power. Nearly impossible to control.
relics.lore: One of the Seven Relics. Restricts immortal Dreakin power. Only compatible souls may wield it.
